title: Comfort+
description: Adds various QOL features that make Minecraft more comfy :)
body:
## Features:
- Dark mode
- Unobtrusive offhand totem
- Lower shield
- And more!

## Coming soon:
- Clear water
- No fog


## Housekeeping:
Yes, this used to be a mod, but recently I have not had the time to maintain a full mod. This is the best I can do right now.

**Font originally from the [Faithful](https://faithfulpack.net/) team. Huge thanks to them.**
